2,000 unique pixel characters. Stored forever on Ethereum.
No IPFS. Two factions. One frontier. Infinite paths.
The color is gone. The stache remains

minting_now.name: Fractal Dreams
minting_now.description: Fractal Dreams — Where intricate patterns, glowing flows, and surreal dreamscapes collide in vibrant digital art. Infinite realms of tech-fantasy beauty.

minting_now.name: Pull Ups and Psy-Op-20
minting_now.description:
A visual narrative of 40 photographs taken in the East Village, NYC during the COVID-19 lockdown, reimagined in the era of computational image intelligence. At its surface, it documents a simple act: an individual performing pull-ups in a city in suspension.

Beneath this, the gallery operates as a

minting_now.name: Geometric Figures
minting_now.description: Geometric face painting uses precise lines, angles, and shapes (like triangles, squares, circles) to deconstruct or build faces, creating abstract, structured, or surreal portraits, often evoking Cubism or modern digital styles for a modern, fragmented, or futuristic look

minting_now.name: Squid
minting_now.description: Collection Squid  #professed. NFTs— unique digital collectibles living on the Ethereum blockchain.

minting_now.name: Tiger Crypto Token
minting_now.description:
From a current collection here is a 47 seconds dNFTs video and sound.
A sharply dressed anthropomorphic tiger stands confidently in front of a glowing financial trading screen filled with fluctuating charts.

minting_now.name: You don't need to get used to this.(慣れなくていいことに慣れないで)
Everything that keeps me together is falling apart
Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: Ape Vibe Pixel Club
minting_now.description: Having navigated a dimensional wormhole, these Apes discovered a new kind of 'cool' within an endless '8-Bit Arcade' environment.

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

minting_now.description: Fallen Angel Punks is a pixel art collection that merges the purity of angels with the rebellion of punks. news.title: 6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...
“highly advanced exploit by the most elite hackers on earth” they stored their seedphrases in a PASSWORD MANAGER lmao Lose it all you morons

Syndicate Replying to @syndicateio The root cause was a private key compromise. Keys were stored in a password manager accessible to a small number of people to handle chain maintenance and upgrades, without an additional encryption layer separate from the password manager. ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with...

Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking forwa...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) Pengu morning Pudgy Penguins, roll call in the comments! This card is the only reason I am using a physical card. Just used the card for the manicure session Th...
Which penguin is your favorite? Huge shoutout to our new MVPs: Let's get to know them

Make your move. Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open
